bio: Sripathi Panditaradhyula Balasubrahmanyam, also referred to as SPB, SP Balu or Balu, was an Indian playback singer, television presenter, actor, music composer, dubbing artist, and film producer. He is widely regarded as one of the greatest Indian singers of all time.

rows: Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd.
Yeh Haseen Vadiyan Yeh Khula Aasman
